videoSnippet.title: Executed to Perfection! || Liem Le vs Matthias Blübaum || Biel Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Lotus July Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/UbnjUeLN
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Le, Quang Liem (2731) - Bluebaum, Matthias (2694)
Biel Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [07] 2026.07.14
D35 Queen's Gambit Declined, exchange, positional line, 5...c6

1.c4 e6 2.Nc3 d5 3.d4 Nf6 4.cxd5 exd5 5.Bg5 c6 6.e3 Bf5 7.Qf3 Bg6 8.Bxf6 Qxf6 9.Qxf6 gxf6 10.Nf3 Nd7 11.Nh4 Bb4 12.f3 a5 13.Kf2 Nb6 14.Rc1 Be7 15.g3 Nc8 16.Ne2 Nd6 17.Nf4 Kf8 18.Rg1 Rg8 19.Be2 Re8 20.h3 Kg7 21.g4 f5 22.Nhg2 fxg4 23.hxg4 f5 24.gxf5 Nxf5 25.Bd3 Kf6 26.Rh1 Bd6 27.Nxg6 hxg6 28.Bxf5 Kxf5 29.Rh7 Re7 30.Rh6 Kf6 31.Rg1 Kg7 32.Rh4 Kf6 33.e4 dxe4 34.fxe4 Bc7 35.e5+ Kf7 36.Ne3 Ke6 37.Rh6 Reg7 38.Kf3 Bd8 39.Ke4 Kd7 40.Rg2 a4 41.a3 Bb6 42.Ng4 Bd8 43.Ne3 Bb6 44.Nd1 Ba5 45.Nf2 Bb6 46.Nd1 Ba5 47.Nc3 b5 48.Ne2 Bd2 49.Rh1 Rf8 50.Rd1 Ba5 51.d5 Rh7 52.dxc6+ Kxc6 53.Nd4+ Kb7 54.Nxb5 Bc7 55.Nd6+ Kc6 56.Rc1+ Kd7 57.Rxg6 Rf2 58.Nc4 Ke7 59.Ne3 Rh4+ 60.Rg4
